summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Business Solutions landing page. All core functionality working including AI chat, lead generation, and recommendations system.

minor_bugs.issue: Does not validate empty session_id and message fields - returns 200 instead of 422
minor_bugs.impact: Minor validation issue, doesn't affect core functionality

email_notification.issue: RESEND_API_KEY is placeholder 're_your_api_key_here' - email notifications may not be sent
email_notification.impact: Email notifications to iloveurbanace@gmail.com may fail
email_notification.note: Backend processes lead submission successfully, only email delivery affected

passed_tests: Landing page loads with dark theme and animated background
AI chat interface functional with Gemini 3 Flash integration
Chat input and send button work correctly
AI responds naturally to user messages
Conversation flow progresses to contact form after sufficient messages
Contact form accepts name, email, and phone input
Lead submission generates AI recommendations and pricing
Glassmorphism design and animations working properly
All data-testid attributes present for testing
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider updating RESEND_API_KEY with actual key for email notifications. Minor backend validation improvement needed for empty chat requests.
